message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on BigInt power computation

Fixed silent failures in large integer power computation algorithm:

Objects/longobject.zig:
- Work stack (ws) operations now panic on OOM instead of silently skipping exponents
- Candidate list (cands) operations now panic on OOM instead of silently skipping
- all_exponents list operations now panic on OOM instead of silently skipping

Silently skipping exponents in power computation would cause mathematically
incorrect results for large integer powers.

All changed from 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable'.
